title: ISO week-year (%G) is not the calendar year (%Y) at year boundaries
rule: ISO-8601 week numbers belong to a WEEK-year that can differ from the calendar year at Jan/Dec boundaries (late-Dec can be week 1 of next year; early-Jan can be week 52/53 of the previous year). Never pair the calendar year with an ISO week number — strftime %Y%V yields wrong labels like 2021-W53; use the matching week-year token (%G with %V, or ISO week-year APIs such as isocalendar()/IsoWeekYear).
triggers: ISO week number wrong at year boundary
December 31 reported as week 1 of next year
